channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: Fender Standard Precision Bass w/ Mojotone 70s pickup & soft case — $650
item.description:
$650 · Good · Stuff from North Dakota

Up for grabs is a massive-sounding 2000s Made in Mexico Fender Precision Bass in black. I believe the body is alder and the neck is maple. This guitar has seen basement and bar shows and lived in a crawlspace in Illinois for a few years but was rescued by me around 2022, brought to a luthier for set-up that same year, and lived in a pet-free/smoke-free studio since.

I’ve installed a Mojotone 70s Clone P-bass pickup that is dead quiet when not playing and packs a ton of punch when you do. I’ve included the original pickup and mounting equipment if you ever want to go back but I think the new pickup sounds all around better. Otherwise, the hardware is all original. Play-wise, check the photos for action and know that, like all used instruments, this bass could use a set-up to your tastes.

Condition-wise, the bass is in good shape and was never abused. The most notable blemishes is the pickguard has a slight wave to it over the years but is purely cosmetic and not noticeable from distance; there are minor impressions in the back of the neck and one spot on the edge of the fretboard that doesn’t impede play at all; there is a small chip and scrape on one side; the tuning machine paddles have a little patina on them. Check the photos carefully, but it truly looks and sounds good.

Listing also includes a nice Roadrunner padded soft case that comfortably holds the bass.

CONUS only - free shipping - no returns - thanks for looking

item.title: 2023 TEAMBUILT WARWICK THUMB BASS IN PRISTINE CONDITION - MADE IN GERMANY — $2,409.67
item.description:
$2,409.67 · Excellent · Andy's Vintage Guitars

Immaculate condition for this 2023 Teambuilt Warwick Thumb, made in Germany and with the original bag, certificate signed by the Hans-Peter Wilfer and Warwick tool box.

This bass comes from the original owner and only had a few hours of use.

very light, sitting at 4.1 kg.

Wenge fretboard, ovangkol body and neck.

item.title: Egmond Typhoon 1960’s - Red Vinyl — $475
item.description:
$475 · Fair · Richard's Shop

Up for sale is a rare, vintage 1960s Egmond Typhoon semi-hollow body electric bass guitar, made in Holland. This instrument features the highly collectible and iconic "Riviera" red vinyl body wrap—a fantastic piece for vintage collectors, surf-rock enthusiasts, or anyone looking for a unique restoration project. 


The serial/production number stamped on the back of the headstock is 2334087.


Build: Birch wood body wrapped in original Riviera Red vinyl.

  • Neck/Fretboard: Birch neck with a rosewood fingerboard.
  • Pickups: Two high-output single-coil "stick of butter" or "Powertone" pickups.
  • Electronics: Often features classic chicken-head rotary knobs, or multiple switches and dials for various pickup combinations and tones.

To the best of my knowledge, the bass has suffered no structural damage over the years however there are cosmetic imperfections and few other small issues listed below. It was fully functional and working perfectly the last time it was played. It has simply been sitting safely unplayed for a number of years. Because I lack the equipment to test it today, it is being sold strictly As-Is, but it is a prime candidate for an easy restoration.


📍 KAUAI SHIPPING

Ships to the Contiguous United States (Lower 48) ONLY. No shipping to Alaska, Puerto Rico, or US Territories. No P.O. Boxes or APO/FPO addresses. Orders from outside the lower 48 will be immediately canceled and refunded.


Local Kauai pick up available as well.



Condition Notes:

1. Electronics: The toggle and tone/switches near the bottom of the body have come internally loose from their mounts. The internal wiring appears intact, meaning it likely just needs the switches screwed back in tightly or minor re-soldering to get it firing again. 

2. Headstock: The abalone decorative guard on the face of the headstock is starting to delaminate/peel away near the top tuning pegs. 

3. Pickguard: There are a couple of visible cracks in the pickguard plastic near the screws.

4. Vinyl Wrap: Shows normal signs of vintage age and minor wear but has held up incredibly well.


Please review all photos carefully, as they form part of the description. 


Returns:

Sold strictly as-is with no returns or refunds due to the nature of the project and shipping location. Please ask any questions before purchasing or making an offer!

item.title: Fender American Performer Mustang Bass 2023 — $1,025
item.description:
$1,025 · Excellent · Wunderlick Guitars

This American Performer Bass from Fender is in like new condition! Set up by my local music techs with 40-95 Ernie Ball flatwound strings. I took a lot of photos to show that it is free of scratches or dents.

Please note that I purchased the parts from the Stratosphere and had my local music shop techs set up the guitar (that's why the serial # on the certificate for the body and the neck serial # do not match). However, this is not a partscaster. All parts are from the American Performer Bass model.

Ships in the padded gig bag depicted.

item.title: 1973 Fender USA Vintage Jazz Bass Neck 4 Bolt — $500
item.description:
$500 · Fair · JJ's Gear Garage

1973 Fender USA Vintage Jazz Bass Neck 4 Bolt In fair condition. This is the real deal, Maple neck with black block inlays. As you can see the previous owner, for some reason sanded the neck down. It is very smooth with no gloss left. The logo was sanded off, along with the neck date. No idea why this was done. For some reason there a hole drilled in the headstock, but not through. Truss rod works like it should, neck is straight. Frets are low, and need to be shined up, but good. There is some extra holes where the tuners go. This is a project for someone, but all the markings are in the right place, ready for a vintage project or restoration. Will be packed well, fully insured. PLEASE ASK ANY QUESTIONS BEFORE BUYING OR MAKING AN OFFER.

48 STATES ONLY, NO OVERSEAS

item.title: Squier Vintage Modified Bass VI 2013-2018 - Olympic White — $700
item.description:
$700 · Excellent · Drums N Strings

Squire Vintage Modified Bass VI in rare Olympic White. Weighs 9 lbs. Strung with LaBella flat wounds. This one comes with a very cool mint pickguard. Plays and sounds great. Minor wear here and there but nothing that shows up well in photos or affects playability. I'm offering free shipping insured and signature required. Offers are considered but I don't see another.... anywhere.

item.title: Squier Classic Vibe '50s Precision Bass 2020 - 2-Color Sunburst with Gig Bag — $374
item.description:
$374 · Very Good · Arizona Guitars and Gear LLC

This Bass is in very good condition. It has been tested, detailed and it's ready to play! It has a couple of minor scratches on the back and under one of the strings. None which affect playability.

The Squier Classic Vibe '50s Precision Bass is a highly regarded, vintage-inspired 4-string bass that faithfully recreates the look, feel, and massive tone of the early 1950s Fender P-Bass. It is known for delivering exceptional value and playability for both beginners and gigging pros.

Key features and specifications include:

  • Body & Finish: Crafted from a resonant pine body (often visible beneath the translucent White Blonde or 2-Color Sunburst finishes) and finished in a slick, gloss polyurethane. [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
  • Electronics: Powered by a single Fender-Designed alnico single-coil pickup, which delivers deep, punchy, and aggressive tones reminiscent of the original '50s era. It also features standard passive Master Volume and Master Tone controls. [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
  • Neck: Features a comfortable, slim "C"-shaped maple neck with a vintage-tint gloss finish, a 9.5"-radius maple fingerboard, and modern narrow-tall frets. It is also equipped with a real bone nut for improved tuning stability. [1, 2]
  • Hardware: Outfitted with vintage-style tuners and a 4-saddle vintage-style bridge utilizing threaded saddles for accurate intonation. [1, 2, 3, 4]
  • Aesthetics: Complete with classic '50s-style headstock markings and knurled flat-top control knobs. [1]

The single-coil pickup setup provides a raw, focused midrange that sets it apart from the thicker, split-coil sound of later P-Basses, making it an excellent choice for country, rock, blues, and soul.

item.title: Spector Euro 5 CST 2026 - Natural Red Burst Gloss — $3,799.99
item.description:
$3,799.99 · Brand New · 12th Fret Music

Spector EURO 5 CST 5-String Active Bass - Natural Red Burst Gloss

Solid Body Active 5-String Electric Bass, Double Cut Style Ash Body with Poplar Burl Top, Ebony Fretboard, EMG X Active Pickups

Manufacturer Description: "The Euro CST draws inspiration from our Woodstock, NY-based Custom Shop, introducing all-new tonewoods, electronics, and finish combinations never seen in the Euro Series. Each Euro CST instrument is meticulously crafted using premium materials, featuring a striking, highly figured Poplar Burl top, a resonant European Ash body, and a 3-piece North American Maple neck paired with an Ebony fingerboard adorned with laminated Abalone Crown inlays. These basses are equipped with a lightweight aluminum bridge for precise and reliable intonation. Premium active EMG X Series pickups deliver the exceptional clarity, attack, and silent operation that defines the Spector sound.

Spector is proud to offer the all-new Spector Legacy preamp for the Euro CST range. Developed in collaboration with Darkglass Electronics, this preamp captures the classic ‘Spector growl’ heard on countless iconic recordings with added versatility (Spector)."

Specifications

Body & Construction

Top Wood: European Poplar Burl

Back Wood: European Ash with a slice of Walnut

Finish: High Gloss

Neck

Neck Wood: 3-piece Maple with graphite rods

Fretboard: Ebony

Number of Frets: 24

Inlays: Laminated abalone crowns

Nut Material: Brass

Nut Width: 1.81"

Scale Length: 35"

Pickups & Electronics

Pickups: Active EMG X Series

Pickup Configuration: Reverse P / J

Controls: Volume, Blend, Treble Cut/Boost, Bass Cut/Boost

Preamp System: Spector Legacy Preamp by Darkglass

Bass EQ: ±12 dB @ 60 Hz

Treble EQ: ±12 dB @ 1 kHz

Hardware

Hardware Color: Black & Gold

Bridge: Aluminum locking bridge with brass saddles

Tuners: Gotoh GB350

Strings

Strings: D’Addario XL Nickel

Other

Case: Gig Bag

String Spacing: 17 mm

(Includes Black "Spector" Gig Bag)

item.title: 2017 Gretsch G6128B Thunder Jet Electric Bass Black MIJ w/OHSC — $2,195
item.description:
$2,195 · Very Good · Imperial Vintage Guitars

2017 Gretsch G6128B Thunder Jet Electric Bass Black MIJ w/OHSC 

This Item Is Located At IVG Burbank

In Very Good Overall Condition (Please See Photos)

Made In Japan

Single-Cutaway Top-Bound Laminated Maple Body In Gloss Black Finish Shows Playwear Throughout Including Some Cosmetic Marks, Dings And Scratches (As Shown)

Two TV Jones Thunder'TronTM Bass Pickups

Chrome Gretsch Tailpiece

Floating Gretsch Roller Bridge

Three-Way Pickup Selector

Master Tone + Volume

Individual Volume Controls For Each Pickup

Pickguard Is Included, But Not Installed (See Photos)

Mahogany Set Neck With Bound Rosewood Fingerboard

Thumbnail Inlays

22 Jumbo Frets

2x2 Gotoh Tuning Machines

Weight: 8lbs 10oz

Nut Width: 1.48"

Neck Depth At 1st Fret: .83"

Neck Depth At 12th Fret: .97"

Comes As Shown With Original Hardshell Case And Pickguard

A striking blend of vintage Gretsch style and thunderous low-end performance, this 2017 Gretsch G6128B Thunder Jet Bass delivers unmistakable looks and tone in a classic gloss black finish. Crafted in Japan, it features a laminated maple body, mahogany set neck, and a pair of powerful TV Jones Thunder'Tron bass pickups that provide rich, articulate sound with exceptional punch and clarity. Premium appointments including a floating roller bridge, Sperzel tuners, bound rosewood fingerboard with thumbnail inlays, and original hardshell case make this a highly desirable instrument for players and collectors alike.

item.title: Sadowsky MetroExpress Hybrid P/J Bass with Maple Fretboard 2023 - Present Candy Apple Red — $650
item.description:
$650 · Excellent · Brendan's Gear Depot

Professionally set up. Gig bag included

item.title: Moollon J5 - Olympic white — $3,817.96
item.description:
$3,817.96 · Very Good · AVB

Moollon J5, Olympic white with matching headstock. Conditions

-playabillity 10/10

-cosmetic 7-8/10 (depends if you are

Into relic). With waiting list of over 4 years at the moment, here is a chance to skip that line:)

item.title: Hamer Cruise Bass 1995 USA — $1,800
item.description:
$1,800 · Excellent · Dylan’s Gear Exchange

1995 USA Hamer Cruise Bass built in New Hartford, Connecticut.

Finished in Candy Apple Red, this bass remains in excellent condition and includes its original Hamer hard shell case.

Features include:

  • USA construction
  • Maple neck
  • Rosewood fingerboard
  • 2Tek Bridge
  • Original hardware
  • Original electronics
  • Original Hamer hard shell case

It plays exceptionally well and is ready for stage or studio use.

Cosmetically, it is in Excellent condition with only a couple of small blemishes (pictured):

  • Small finish chip near the rear strap button
  • Minor ding on the back of the headstock

Ships securely in the original Hamer hard shell case.

item.title: JD Guitars 2026 Neptune 8-string Mini Bass Antique Denim — $1,299
item.description:
$1,299 · Brand New · JD Guitars

It seems I have yet to run out of ideas for the mini-bass format that has held my attention for the past few years. So ,here’s the 8-string version. Tuned eEaAdDgG. Scale length is 23.125” The body is Ash, finished in a new color,Antique Denim, and capped with a 1/4” drop-top of Spalted Tamarind. The Curley Maple neck has a finished maple fretboard with Mother of Pearl fret-markers and side-dots. The necks’ dual-action truss rod is supported by 2 carbon fiber rods that run the length of the neck. Nut width is 1 5/8”. Fretboard radius is 12”. Body, neck and headstock have binding. Pickup is EMG TBHZ.(passive, no battery required). One Volume, one Tone. Bridge by Leo Quan. Tuners are Gotoh. Octave strings have locking tuners. The design lends itself to playing seated, which helps manage the neck-dive that comes from having 8 tuning machines on the headstock. On a strap, the neck-dive is quite manageable (imo). Hand-carved bone nut. Weighs 7lbs 13oz. Ships with gigbag.

item.title: Warwick Rockbass Corvette $$ 4 - Natural — $800
item.description:
$800 · Excellent · JM Gear Shack

Fantastic condition, plays beautifully. Never gigged or moved outside my home studio. Local pickup or shipping conus

item.title: Glossy Black Encore E4 Blaster Bass Guitar in Excellent Condition — $217.84
item.description:
$217.84 · Excellent · Rich Preloved Gear

Bass and soft case only - the stand in the photos isn’t included.


Encore E4 four-string electric bass in black. It’s hardly been played and has spent most of its time safely stored away, so the condition is very clean overall. Straightforward P-style setup with simple volume and tone controls, making it a good first bass or an inexpensive spare.


Happy to consider sensible offers.

item.title: Warwick German Pro Series GPS Corvette $$ 2022 - Burgundy Red — $2,599
item.description:
$2,599 · Excellent · Michele 's Gear Bazaar

I bought this beautiful bass from Sweetwater new in July 2025. I have played it a handful of times only in the smoke-free house. It is in excellent condition, and has spent most of it's time in it's gig bag. This is why I am selling it. I play a couple other basses way more. It functions 100%. Straight, smooth neck. Adjust a nut intact. An amazing bass to hold and play. It does weigh 10 lbs, but stays nicely with a padded strap. The Warwick Growl...The Sound of Wood!!!

item.title: Fender Squier Classic Vibe Bass IV - Black — $569.99
item.description:
$569.99 · Brand New · Wolf Music Company

Description
The Classic Vibe Bass VI is a faithful tribute to the secret weapon of producers and adventurous players that have dared to explore it since its original production from 1961 to 1975. Tuned an octave lower than a guitar and featuring a vintage-style tremolo, the Bass VI is the perfect companion to accompany any guitar or bass player into uncharted territory. Player-friendly features include a slim, comfortable "C"-shaped neck profile with an easy-playing 9.5"-radius fingerboard and narrow-tall frets, as well as a floating bridge with barrel saddles for solid string stability. This throwback Squier model also features 1960s-inspired headstock markings, rich-looking nickel-plated hardware and a slick vintage-tint gloss neck finish for an old-school vibe.

Features
100% Designed by Fender
Inspired by original Bass VI models
Fender-Designed alnico pickups
Vintage-Tint gloss neck finish
Nickel-Plated hardware

item.title: Aria Pro Ii 5 St Bass Guitar Bourbon Barrel Finish — $579
item.description:
$579 · Brand New · Wire Meets Wood Guitars

Aria Pro II 313-BB Electric Bass

The Aria Pro II 313-BB is all about style, power, and soul. Whether you're laying down smooth grooves or bringing the thunder on stage, this bass is built to make you feel something. Its bourbon barrel-inspired look is unforgettable, and the sound? It hits hard and deep. If you want an instrument that plays as good as it looks, this is the one.

Aria Pro II 313-BB Electric Bass Review

Under the hood, the 313-BB delivers serious tone thanks to its powerful P/J pickup setup. You get punchy lows, crisp highs, and everything in between. The roasted maple neck feels smooth and fast, and the open-pore satin finish not only looks killer but lets the wood breathe for better sound. It's a bass that sounds as bold as it looks—and it plays like a dream.

Aria Pro II 313-BB Electric Bass Features
  • Dark brown body with a unique metal pickguard for a bold look
  • Satin finish makes it feel smooth and helps it sound better
  • Comfortable neck that's easy to adjust anytime
  • Powerful pickups give you tons of sound options
  • Built to handle everything from soul to rock and roll
Aria Pro II 313-BB Electric Bass Specs
  • Available in 4-string and 5-string versions
  • Body made from ash
  • Roasted maple bolt-on neck with rosewood fingerboard
  • 24 frets with 34" scale length
  • Alnico-5 pickups in P/J configuration
  • Wilkinson WOB41 bridge with chrome hardware

item.title: Fender American Vintage '62 Precision Bass 2008 - 3-Tone Sunburst — $1,799
item.description:
$1,799 · Very Good · The Bass Shop

Product details:

This bass would be in excellent condition if there wasn't a 2" just to the right of the volume knob. Overwise, it's in great shape and all aspects of the bass work perfectly with a straight neck and lots of fret life.

WEIGHT:  8 lbs. 6 ozs.    

SERIAL #:  V182497

DATE:  2008

NUT WIDTH:  1 3/4"    

COLOR:  3-Tone Sunburst 

BODY/NECK/FINGERBOARD:  Alder/ Maple/ Rosewood

PICKUPS/ELECTRONICS:  Fender Vintage Split Humbucker / Passive Vol. Tone     

CONDITION:  Very Good

CASE:  OHSC

item.title: Fender Precision fretless bass olympic white 1971 - olympic white — $7,299
item.description:
$7,299 · Very Good · Galaxy Music Company

Who wants a tasty bass?

This could be the coolest early 70s fretless bass ever in olympic white

Looks to be all original body finish pick up and electronics

Lots of flame on the headstock in the back of the neck really some beautiful wood on a phenomenal playing bass

Includes original case don't miss out on this beauty

item.title: Fender Highway One Precision Bass 2006 - Honey Blonde Transparent — $1,299
item.description:
$1,299 · Very Good · The Bass Shop

Product details:

These are great, U.S. built basses that sell for hundreds less than a typical American Standard Fender. This bass has seen a good bit of playing time, hence the wear, and comes with a hardshell case. 

WEIGHT:  7 lbs.  8 ozs.    

SERIAL #:  Z5049072

DATE:  2006

NUT WIDTH:  1 5/8"    

COLOR:  Honey Blonde Transparent

PICKUPS/ELECTRONICS:  Fender Split Coil Pickups/ Passive Vol., Tone

CASE:  HSC

item.title: Fender Vintera II '60s Jazz Bass with Rosewood Fretboard 2023 - 2026 - Black — $746
item.description:
$746 · Excellent · Jonathan's Shop

Excellent condition with gig bag. May have light surface scratches. Upgraded to Fender Hi-Mass bridge. ~9.2lbs

item.title: Jackson JS Series JS3 Concert Bass — $229.99
item.description:
$229.99 · Good · Music Manor Lansing MI

Used Jackson JS Series Concert Bass JS3

There are a couple obvious paint chips on on this JS3 that were colored in, one in the upper bout right by the neck and the other in the lower bout near the the jack (both visible in photos). The headstock point has a chip that is revealing wood and is missing a bit of binding.  You'll also find some finish scratches, mostly on the back, but also a small patch on the top near the bridge. It's been used for sure, but still rocks like a Jackson, so turn it up!

Jackson JS Series Concert Bass JS3 models rock seismic sound, style and affordability.

The Jackson JS Series Concert Bass JS3 is a four-string, 34"-scale model featuring a lightweight and resonant poplar body, bolt-on maple neck with graphite reinforcement and a 12"-16" compound radius bound amaranth fingerboard with 24 jumbo frets and pearloid sharkfin inlays.

Dual Jackson high-output humbucking bass pickups create a monstrous low-end growl, while a HiMass™ bridge provides rock-solid stability, improved sustain and bolder tone. Tone can be refined and tweaked with a single volume and blend controls complemented by an active three-band EQ. Loaded with vibe and value, this Concert Bass JS3 is available in Satin Black finishes with black hardware.

Get your hands on the Used Jackson JS Series Concert Bass JS3 today!

Order now to pick up in store today! We also offer quick shipping across the United States! All of our Certified USED and VINTAGE items are functional unless noted otherwise. In addition, our in house technicians test and maintain each individual item. Above all, we guarantee satisfaction here at Music Manor in Lansing, Michigan.

item.title: Fender Hama Okamoto Signature Katana Bass 2021 - Black — $1,200
item.description:
$1,200 · Good · Europa Music

For sale is the Fender Hama Okamoto signature Katana bass. it has a small cosmetic paint chip on the largest horn. Otherwise, in perfect working order. Price is fairly firm, but make an offer.

item.title: Fender/MJT PJ Bass with Geezer Butler EMGs -Super Light Weight — $950
item.description:
$950 · Excellent · Jasper's Bass Shed

I built this bass earlier this year from an MJT lightweight alder body with black nitro and a moderate relic job, mated to a Fender “Precision to Jazz Conversion” neck, EMG Geezer Butler passive PJs, and Hipshot US Ultralight lollipops.
It also has a Wilkinson bridge with brass saddles, a 3-string tree, white Jazz-style knobs, and a red tortoise pickguard.

The MJT body is super light and the nitro paint and relic job look awesome.

The neck is direct from Fender and features a 1.5” Jazz nut width, a modern C profile, pau ferro fingerboard with 12” radius and 20 med-jumbo frets.

Weighs only 7 lbs and 13.6 oz - a real back saver!
It currently has Ernie Ball straplocks installed. Let me know if you want them; otherwise I can install the original standard strap buttons.
Will ship in a new Fender gig bag.
Message me with any questions.

item.title: Fender American Professional II Precision Bass with Rosewood Fretboard 2020 - Present - 3-Color Sunburst — $1,500
item.description:
$1,500 · Excellent · Walter's Gear Garage

This item was purchased directly from fender in 2024, since then it has been gigged with lightly, had 2 professional setups, and has been cleaned prior to shipping.

Includes original case and original paperwork. Offers accepted!

I am a music education student who used to play this bass in a hip hop band.

If you have any questions or concerns please let me know I‘m happy to discuss.

Item has minimal wear from normal use with a pick. Pick guard has light scratches.

I have more photos and can take more to send on request.

This is a quality American made instrument built to last with minimal wear and tear.

It’s my favorite bass neck I’ve ever played on and sounds absolutely beautiful and classic in every way you want a P Bass to be.

Thank you for checking out my listing!

item.title: Fender American Professional Classic Precision Bass 2025 - Present - Faded Sherwood Green Metallic — $1,079
item.description:
$1,079 · Excellent · Jonathan's Shop

Excellent + condition with gig bag, COA and tools. May have light surface scratches. ~8.2lbs

A truly magnificent bass …

$3,499 · Very Good · BAMonBASS Gear Emporium

Up for grabs is a Rogers Rbass SC5

  • Myrtle Burl Top
  • Ash Body
  • 3pc Maple neck
  • 34” scale
  • Aguilar DCB pickups

item.title: Sterling StingRay Ray34 with Roasted Maple Neck 2018 - Present - Firemist Silver — $535
item.description:
$535 · Excellent · Jason's GAS station

Plays great, just never got into the whole MM thing. Large distinctive dark spot on wood on neck (see pics).

item.title: Ibanez BTB1805 Natural Low Gloss 2017 5-String Electric Bass Guitar — $1,475.67
item.description:
$1,475.67 · Very Good · Sell Us Your Guitar

Here for sale we have an Ibanez BTB1805 5-string Electric Bass guitar in Natural Low Gloss. Made in Indonesia in 2017 this guitar features a neck-thru construction consisting of a 9-piece Wenge/Bubinga/Maple neck with Rosewood fingerboard, Ash wings and Rosewood top and back. Other features include Mono-rail V bridge and Gotoh GB707. A pair of Aguilar DCB pickups are fitted and wired to an Ibanez Custom Electronics 3-band EQ, pickup balancer, master volume, EQ bypass switch and 3-way mid-frequency toggle.


The 9-piece Wenge/Bubinga/Maple ‘BTB5’ neck profile allows you to navigate the Rosewood fingerboard with ease, allowing for comfortable reach in all registers and promoting ergonomic thumb positioning. The 35” radius provides a comfortable playing surface and with the 1.85” nut width allows for ease of different techniques such as slap bass or chordal playing. The Low Gloss finish is fantastic for smooth, quick transitions up and down the neck whilst the double cutaway body design allows the player to have unobstructed access to the entire register.


The pair of passive Aguilar DCB pickups installed in this bass work in conjunction with the on-board preamp to deliver an incredibly versatile range of sounds. There is a great fundamental bass tone with the controls at their midpoints, producing a warm and powerful low end, clear mids and sparkling top end that captures the attack of your playing. The rest of the extensive controls provide ample tone-sculpting opportunities, allowing you to craft the perfect sound for almost any musical setting, as well as tweaking whilst playing. Perfect for the contemporary working musician who demands quality and versatility. 


Brand- Ibanez

Model- BTB1805

Finish- Natural Low Gloss

Year- 2017

Made In- Indonesia

Body- Ash wings w/ Rosewood top/back

Neck- 9-piece Wenge/Bubinga/Maple

Neck Profile- BTB5

Fingerboard- Rosewood

Fingerboard Radius- 15.75"

Frets- 24

Scale Legnth- 35"

Nut Width- 1.85"

Pickups- 2x Aguilar DCB bridge

Controls- Global volume / pickup balancer / 3-band EQ (bass/mid/treble) / EQ bypass toggle / 3-way mid-frequency toggle


Luthier Report


Our ID: 1210426203051

Weight: 10.1lbs  

Serial: I161204706 (Now missing partially. Owner advises used a clip on tuner there which appears to have removed a portion of the decal)


Aesthetic Condition:

Headstock: Overall very good condition, the top edge demonstrates several indentations to the top edge which chip the finish, revealing the wood beneath. The front face demonstrates a patch of light indentations toward the bottom bass side corner that do not pierce the finish. The serial and model number decal has worn away, fragments of this have spread across the upper rear face.

Neck: Overall very good condition, the rear of the neck demonstrates light scratching and indentation visible only under direct lighting at certain angles. These can be somewhat discerned beneath the thumb but are somewhat difficult to differentiate from the open pore finish.

Body: Overall very good condition, the front face demonstrates light indentation throughout, most notably to the bass side waist.  A patch of finish has worn away to the bass side of the bridge pickup. The edges of the guitar demonstrate light to moderate indentation, piercing the finish occasionally along the lower bout. All aspects of the body demonstrate light scratching visible only under direct lighting at certain angles.


Condition of Frets:

The frets demonstrate minimal signs of use.


Current Set Up:

Truss Rod: Fully functional. Truss rod tool (4mm hex) not included.

Hardware: Fully functional with light signs of wear.

Structural: No concerns or issues to note.


Height of the string from the 12th Fret-2mm - Bass 2.5mm


Please be aware that the action on a guitar may move slightly in transit and this measurement is the current height.


Strings on Guitar - 45-100

On the E string, when playing in the middle to upper register with a moderate to heavy attack, some string rattle is present.


Electrics: 

Fully functional.


Case & Accessories

Ibanez soft shell case

The case demonstrates light signs of use. 


Please be aware that for international buyers import fees are not included in our postage and packaging cost, this only covers the cost of the guitar being sent to you. Import fees will be charged by Customs upon the guitar's arrival in the recipient country. Due to Brexit, this also applies to EU buyers. We advise checking the total import cost with Customs as this is not information we are able to accurately provide.

item.title: Fender Vintera II '60s Precision Bass 3-Colour Sunburst 2023 Electric Bass — $1,314.05
item.description:
$1,314.05 · Excellent · Sell Us Your Guitar

This guitar is a commission sale. If you have a high-end or vintage guitar you are interested in selling please contact us. 


Here for sale we have a Fender Vintera II '60s Precision Bass in 3-Colour Sunburst finish. Made in Mexico in 2023, this guitar takes inspiration from a ‘60’s Fender P-Bass- widely regarded as the golden era of the P Bass. A bolt-on construction is employed comprising an Alder Body, Maple neck and 20 fret Slab Rosewood fingerboard. This guitar is fitted with a 4-Saddle Vintage-Style with Threaded Steel Saddles bridge and Vintage-Style Open-Back tuning machines. A Vintage-Style '60s Split Single-Coil Precision Bass pickup is installed, and is wired to master volume and tone controls. 


The Maple neck plays well, with the Early ‘60s “C” shape, providing a lively and articulate playing experience in all registers. The profile is certainly easy to get along with, offering ergonomic thumb positioning and comfortable reach across the neck. The Gloss finish to the rear provides a slick and smooth playing surface, ensuring that navigation of the 34" scale is a fast and breezy affair. The Slab Rosewood fingerboard is pleasant under the fingers, and with its 7.25" radius delivers a suitably vintage-inspired playing experience across the register. 


The Vintage-Style '60s Split Single-Coil pickup installed in this guitar delivers fantastic fundamental bass tone right away. Deep, rumbling lows will fill out your mix, whilst punchy mids and a sparkly top end will ensure that you have plenty of snap and attack to provide a lively and percussive performance. The controls keep things simple; not intruding on the playing experience but still offering ample opportunities for tone shaping. A fantastic example of a vintage-inspired Mexican-built Fender. 


Brand- Fender

Model- Vintera II '60s Precision Bass

Finish- 3-Colour Sunburst

Year- 2023

Made In- Mexico

Body- Alder

Neck- Maple

Neck Profile- Early '60s 'C'

Fingerboard- Slab Rosewood

Fingerboard Radius- 7.25"

Frets- 20

Scale Length- 34"

Nut Width- 1.75"

Pickups- Vintage-Style '60s Split Single-Coil Precision Bass

Controls- Volume, Tone


Luthier Report


Our ID: 1220426203300

Weight: 8.7lbs  

Serial: MX23149573


Aesthetic Condition:

Headstock: Overall very good condition, the top edge demonstrates two indentations, one on the treble side and one to the tip of the headstock. A small red finish imperfection is apparent to the front face towards the top edge. Some finish wear revealing the wood beneath is apparent to the treble side edge where the guitar would contact a hanger.

Neck: Overall excellent condition, it is difficult to discern any markings to the neck and fingerboard.

Body: Overall very good condition, a patch of moderate scratching is apparent between the bridge and the bottom edge, piercing the top clear coat slightly. All aspects of the body demonstrate infrequent light scratching visible only under direct lighting at certain angles, as is common with high gloss finish.


Condition of Frets:

The frets demonstrate light signs of use, not affecting playability. There is considerable material remaining for future fret work.


Current Set Up:

Truss Rod: Fully functional. Truss rod tool (flathead driver) not included.

Hardware: Fully functional with light signs of wear.

Structural: No concerns or issues to note.

Height of the string from the 12th Fret-2mm - Bass 2.5mm

Please be aware that the action on a guitar may move slightly in transit and this measurement is the current height.

Strings on Guitar - 45-100


Electrics: Fully functional.


Case & Accessories

Fender Deluxe Soft Case

The case demonstrates very light signs of use. 


Please be aware that for international buyers import fees are not included in our postage and packaging cost, this only covers the cost of the guitar being sent to you. Import fees will be charged by Customs upon the guitar's arrival in the recipient country. Due to Brexit, this also applies to EU buyers. We advise checking the total import cost with Customs as this is not information we are able to accurately provide.

item.title: Fender Player II Jazz Bass - Aquatone Blue — $649.99
item.description:
$649.99 · Excellent · EGA Guitars

🎸 Used – Excellent Condition | Lowest Price Online – Don’t Miss Out!
🚀 Now Offering 2-Day Shipping – Select at Checkout
✨ Every Guitar/Bass Includes a Fresh Set of Strings & a Basic Setup – Read Our Reviews!

🏆 Hassle-Free Returns

New Items: 30 days from delivery

Used & Vintage: 7 days from delivery
Return in original condition for a refund (less shipping). See our full shop policy for details.


Description


Step into the spotlight with the Fender® Player II Jazz Bass®, combining iconic tone with modern updates for today’s players. Its Modern “C”-profile neck with satin urethane finish on the back and 9.5"-radius slab rosewood or maple fingerboard ensures fast, fluid playability, while 20 medium jumbo frets allow for smooth leads and complex lines.

The alder body comes in classic Fender finishes and archival-inspired colors, and Player Series Alnico V Single-Coil Jazz Bass® pickups deliver sweet highs, growling mids, and seismic lows. With a 4-saddle adjustable bridge, single-groove steel saddles, and open-gear tuners, this bass provides precise tuning stability and endless tonal flexibility.

Item Shown: Player II Jazz Bass®, Rosewood Fingerboard, Aquatone Blue
Model #: 0140480518
Weight: 8.7 lbs
Case/Gig Bag: Sold Separately

Product Specs

Body

  • Body: Alder
  • Body Finish: Gloss Polyester
  • Body Shape: Jazz Bass®

Neck

  • Neck Material: Maple
  • Neck Shape: Modern "C"
  • Neck Construction: 4-Bolt Standard
  • Neck Finish: Satin Urethane Finish on Back of Neck with Gloss Urethane Headstock Face
  • Fingerboard: Slab Rosewood
  • Fingerboard Radius: 9.5" (241 mm)
  • Number of Frets: 20
  • Fret Size: Medium Jumbo
  • Position Inlays: White Dot
  • Nut Material: Synthetic Bone
  • Nut Width: 1.5" (38.1 mm)
  • Truss Rods: Single Action, Head Adjust

Electronics

  • Pickup Configuration: JJ
  • Neck Pickup: Player Series Alnico 5 Single-Coil Jazz Bass®
  • Bridge Pickup: Player Series Alnico 5 Single-Coil Jazz Bass®
  • Controls: Volume 1. (Middle Pickup), Volume 2. (Bridge Pickup), Master Tone
  • Pickup Switching: None

Hardware

  • Bridge: 4-Saddle Standard
  • Hardware Finish: Nickel/Chrome
  • Pickguard: 3-Ply Parchment
  • Control Knobs: Black Plastic with White Indicator
  • Tuning Machines: Standard Open-Gear

Miscellaneous

  • Color: Aquatone Blue
  • Series: Player II
  • Strings: Fender® USA 7250M Nickel Plated Steel (.045-.105 Gauges), PN 0737250406
  • Dimensions: 4.00x15.00x49.90 IN

item.title: Sterling Ray34CA Fretless 2013 - 2017 - 3 Tone Sunburst — $799
item.description:
$799 · Excellent · Zippy's Gear Outlet

Man this thing sounds amazing. I was hoping to be able to play fretless as well as I can my fretted basses but I'm not as patient as I should be. But that has nothing to do with this extraordinary instrument. Neck is thinner like a Jazz Bass. I switched out the stock pre amp with a John East MMSR Pre amp that is spliced into battery compartment for easy battery changes. Added a TUSQ nut. Absolutely no fretwear at all. lol. This thing mwaaahs and groans with the best of them. In fantastic shape and I can't find any others like it on the web anywhere. A rare bird indeed. I also changed the white pickguard for a tortoise guard. Original not included but will ship with original gig bag in excellent shape as well. Weighs in at a solid 9.9 lbs.

item.title: Rickenbacker 4003 Bass Guitar 2021 - Mapleglo — $2,099.99
item.description:
$2,099.99 · Very Good · The Starving Musician - Santa Clara

Rickenbacker 4003 Bass Guitar in Mapleglo. Comes with Rickenbacker hardshell case.

item.title: Ibanez EHB605-WNF Bass Workshop 2025 - Present - Walnut Flat — $899
item.description:
$899 · Brand New · Ron's Music

Brand new with warranty! We are an Authorized Ibanez dealer!

  • SPECS
    • neck typeEHB55pc Maple/Jatoba neck
    • top/back/bodyOkoume body
    • fretboardJatoba fretboardWhite dot inlay
    • fretMedium frets
    • number of frets24
    • bridgeMR5HS bridge
    • string space18mm
    • neck pickupα1 neck pickupPassive
    • bridge pickupα1 bridge pickupPassive
    • equalizerIbanez Custom Electronics 3-band EQ w/ EQ bypass switch (passive tone control on treble pot)
    • factory tuning1G,2D,3A,4E,5B
    • stringsD'Addario® EXL165 + .130
    • string gauge.045/.065/.085/.105/.130
    • hardware colorBlack

      • Scale :864mm/34"
      • a : Width45mm at NUT
      • b : Width74mm at 24F
      • c : Thickness19.5mm at 1F
      • d : Thickness21.5mm at 12F
      • Radius :500mmR

item.title: Pre-Ernie Ball Music Man StingRay c.1978–1979 Black / Maple – Lightweight 3.9 kg – 3-Bolt – Pat.Pend Bridge — $5,726.93
item.description:
$5,726.93 · Excellent · Paul

Vintage Leo-Fender-era Music Man StingRay bass in black finish with maple neck and maple fretboard. Pre-Ernie Ball production from the late-1970s Fullerton, California period.

Serial number: B008470

The bass features the classic early construction details including the 3-bolt neck with Micro-Tilt adjustment, original “Pat. Pend.” string-mute bridge and the 2-band active EQ. The pickup spacing and hardware correspond to the late-1970s transitional StingRay period.

The instrument is in excellent condition for its age, showing only a few small dings and light scratch marks as shown in the photos. Hardware shows normal light vintage patina. No structural damage visible.

With a weight of 3.9 kg, this is a notably lightweight example for a late-70s StingRay.

Original case included.

A genuine late-70s StingRay with the characteristic construction of the original production era.

Import taxes and duties are the buyer’s responsibility.

item.title: Gibson Thunderbird 2012 Cherry Rare w OHSC — $1,999
item.description:
$1,999 · Good · The Wigwam

Nicely setup with new strings, sounds great!
2-3 dings I can see, tried my best to photograph them, and some wear by the bridge presumably from a pick. This one has been played and loved because it’s a fantastic player! Electronics cavity has been professionally shielded, but the bass is all original; this can easily be undone if need be.
Includes original hard case, candy, and original gibson strings.

This is the only one of these in this finish listed in the past year, don’t miss out!

Offers considered!

item.title: Yerby Custom Semi-Hollow 4 String Neck Through Short Scale bass — $900
item.description:
$900 · Excellent · Magpie Music

Custom Handmade Short-Scale Bass by Gary Yerby – Neck-Through, Semi-Hollow, Includes New Gator Hard Case...

This is a one-of-a-kind custom bass handcrafted by Gary Yerby of Castalian Springs, Tennessee. Gary builds exceptional custom instruments with outstanding craftsmanship, and this bass is no exception.

The bass features a 30-inch short scale and a neck-through-body design, providing excellent sustain, stability, and comfortable playability.

Features:

  • 30" short-scale neck
  • Neck-through construction
  • Mahogany and maple laminated neck
  • Rosewood fingerboard with maple dot inlays
  • Semi-hollow body
  • Mahogany top and back
  • Maple sides
  • Seymour Duncan Quarter Pound bass pickups
  • Heavy string through bass bridge for excellent sustain and resonance
  • Chrome Guyker open back tuning machines
  • All chrome hardware

This bass has a warm, resonant acoustic character thanks to the semi-hollow construction, while the Seymour Duncan Quarter Pound pickups provide a powerful, articulate tone with plenty of punch. The neck-through design and heavy brass bridge contribute to impressive sustain and a solid, responsive feel.

Whether you're looking for a unique stage instrument, a studio bass with character, or simply appreciate handcrafted American instruments, this bass delivers quality, tone, and individuality that you won't find in a mass-produced model.

This is a fantastic-playing, great-sounding custom bass that's ready for its next owner. Feel free to message me with any questions or if you'd like additional photos or measurements.

item.title: G&L MJ4 2016 - Green Burst — $1,500
item.description:
$1,500 · Excellent · Ray's Place

Here's my beautiful G&L MJ4 for sale.

USA Goodness!!

Plays & sounds great!!

But I'm more of a PBass guy.

8.6lbs

1 5/8 at the nut

Unfortunately when I got it it didn't come with build sheet.

Comes with a nice G&L gig bag.

item.title: Sadowsky Limited Edition MetroLine 24-Fret Modern Electric Bass Guitar - Natural Transparent Satin — $4,864
item.description:
$4,864 · Brand New · GearNuts

Electric Bass Limited Edition with Koa Top Ash Body Maple Neck Ebony Fingerboard and 2 Humbucking Pickups - Natural Transparent Satin.

item.title: Hohner Professional B2A Steinberger licensed Red — $894.83
item.description:
$894.83 · Very Good · Khammas Vintage Gear

A red Hohner bass guitar from the 1980s, including the original soft bag. Headless design ‘Licensed by Steinberger Sound’ – metal brace for improved balance.

The serial number is 8603609

The B2 featured passive Select ‘designed by EMG’ pickups and two volume controls and one tone control. The B2A added a switchable active buffer circuit, powered by a 9-volt block battery.

The bass has a battery compartment that appears to hold two 9-volt block batteries. A dummy battery is inserted in one of the slots. The passive pickups also work without power. Only slight fret wear, minor scratches and a tiny notch on the neck.

item.title: Charvel 2B bass guitar 1980's White with chainsaw case — $1,200
item.description:
$1,200 · Good · Metal Pedals

Wonderful bass , great fast low action player, sounds great with no play wear ... crazy color aging but cool looking yellow now... Chainsaw case is very clean and in excellent condition.. some obvious nicks or dings from time...

item.title: Fender Pawn Shop Bass VI 2013 - 2014 - 3-Color Sunburst — $1,899.99
item.description:
$1,899.99 · Excellent · Pro Audio Plus

Like new. Played only a handful of times. Check the photos for details. Comes w gig bag. Questions welcome.

item.title: Gibson SG EB-0 1961 - 1968 - Cherry Husk Project Repair — $799
item.description:
$799 · Non Functioning · my guitars wanna kill your drama

Mid to Late 1960’s Gibson EB-O Sg Bass Husk Project.

Overall nice shape and no breaks or major repairs.

headstock is beveled and the heel seems to have been shave and contoured a bit. neck is straight and trussrod seems to be working and has tension.

Original looking case has serious hinge issues and will need repaired.

item.title: Squier Classic Vibe '60s Mustang Bass Olympic White — $399
item.description:
$399 · Excellent · AM Guitar Works

This barely used Squier Classic Vibe 60's Mustang bass is in near new condition. No scratches, fret wear, dings, etc. It is currently set up with LaBella short scale flatwound strings.

It has been professionally set up in our full service shop for ease of playing and best tone possible.

Description

While small in stature, the Classic Vibe '60s Mustang® Bass packs a punch of incredible tone courtesy of the Fender-Designed alnico split-coil pickup. Small hands will appreciate the short 30" scale length and slim, comfortable "C"-shaped neck profile with an easy-playing 9.5"-radius fingerboard and narrow-tall frets. This throwback Squier model also features 1960s-inspired headstock markings, rich-looking nickel-plated hardware and a slick vintage-tint gloss neck finish for an old-school vibe.

Features

  • 100% designed by Fender
  • Inspired by 1960s-era Mustang Bass models
  • Fender-Designed alnico pickups
  • Vintage-tint gloss neck finish
  • Nickel-plated hardware

item.title: Fender JB-STD Jazz Bass Reissue MIJ 2014 3 Tone Sunburst — $450
item.description:
$450 · Excellent · Alex's Gear

Fender Bass in excellent condition, made in Japan. Comes with case.

item.title: Squier FSR Sonic Precision Bass - Surf Green — $199.99
item.description:
$199.99 · Excellent · EGA Guitars

🎸 Used – Excellent Condition | Lowest Price Online – Don’t Miss Out!
🚀 Now Offering 2-Day Shipping – Select at Checkout
✨ Every Guitar/Bass Includes a Fresh Set of Strings & a Basic Setup – Read Our Reviews!

🏆 Hassle-Free Returns       

  • New Items: 30 days from delivery
  • Used & Vintage: 7 days from delivery
    Return in original condition for a refund (less shipping). See our full shop policy for details.


Description

The Squier Sonic® Precision Bass® is ready to launch any musical adventure into warp speed, offering iconic Fender® style and inspiring tone for players at any stage.

This P Bass® features a slim and inviting "C"-shaped maple neck profile with a narrow 1.5" nut width and a thin, lightweight poplar body for exceptional playing comfort. A Squier® split single-coil pickup delivers punchy, articulate bass tone with the classic Precision Bass® sound players know and love.

Additional details include a 4-saddle hardtail bridge for precise intonation adjustment, vintage-style open-gear tuning machines for smooth, accurate tuning, and durable chrome-plated hardware that completes its stage-ready appearance.

Item Shown: FSR Squier Sonic® Precision Bass®, Maple Fingerboard, White Pickguard, Surf Green
Model #: 0373902557
Case/Gig Bag: Sold Separately
Weight: 8 lbs

  • Neck Finish: Satin Urethane

item.title: Squier Classic Vibe Bass VI - Black — $460.99
item.description:
$460.99 · Excellent · EGA Guitars

🎸 Used – Excellent Condition | Minor Back Scratch
✅ Cosmetic only and does not affect playability.
💰 Lowest Price Online – Don’t Miss Out!
🚀 Now Offering 2-Day Shipping – Select at Checkout
✨ Every Guitar/Bass Includes a Fresh Set of Strings & a Basic Setup – Read Our Reviews!

🏆 Hassle-Free Returns

New Items: 30 days from delivery

Used & Vintage: 7 days from delivery
Return in original condition for a refund (less shipping). See our full shop policy for details.



Description


The Classic Vibe Bass VI is a faithful tribute to the secret weapon of producers and adventurous players that have dared to explore it since its original production from 1961 to 1975. Tuned an octave lower than a guitar and featuring a vintage-style tremolo, the Bass VI is the perfect companion to accompany any guitar or bass player into uncharted territory.

Player-friendly features include a slim, comfortable "C"-shaped neck profile with an easy-playing 9.5"-radius fingerboard and narrow-tall frets, as well as a floating bridge with barrel saddles for solid string stability. This throwback Squier® model also features 1960s-inspired headstock markings, rich-looking nickel-plated hardware and a slick vintage-tint gloss neck finish for an old-school vibe.

Item Shown: Classic Vibe Bass VI, Laurel Fingerboard, Black
Model #: 0374580506
Weight: 8.6 lbs
Case/Gig Bag: Sold Separately


Product Specs


Body

  • Body: Poplar
  • Body Finish: Gloss Polyurethane
  • Body Shape: Bass VI
  • Color: Black

Neck

  • Neck Finish: Tinted Gloss Urethane
  • Neck Material: Maple
  • Neck Shape: "C" Shape
  • Scale Length: 30" (762 mm)
  • Fingerboard: Indian Laurel
  • Fingerboard Radius: 9.5" (241 mm)
  • Number of Frets: 21
  • Fret Size: Narrow Tall
  • Nut Material: Bone
  • Nut Width: 1.685" (42.8 mm)
  • Position Inlays: White Pearloid Block
  • Truss Rods: Head Adjust

Electronics

  • Middle Pickup: Fender® Designed Alnico Single-Coil
  • Neck Pickup: Fender® Designed Alnico Single-Coil
  • Configuration: SSS
  • Pickup Configuration: SSS
  • Controls: Master Volume, Master Tone
  • Pickup Switching: 3-On/Off Slide Switches (One for Each Pickup)
  • Special Electronics: 2-Position Slide Switch for Bass-Cut "Strangle" Circuit

Hardware

  • Tuning Machines: Vintage-Style
  • Control Knobs: Black Plastic
  • Pickguard: 4-Ply Tortoiseshell
  • Strings: Fender® Nickel Plated Steel (.024-.084, Gauges)

  • Country Of Origin: ID

item.title: Sire Marcus Miller V-10 2026 - Transparent Black Satin — $1,199
item.description:
$1,199 · Excellent · Bobby's Gear Garage

Less than a month old and has never left the house! Comes with a Sire Gig Bag!

Body Material: Swamp Ash + Solid Poplar Burl
Body Shape: Marcus Miller Jazz Shape

Scale: 34"
